intended_use: Rayvolve is a computer-assisted detection and diagnosis (CAD) software device to assist radiologists and emergency physicians in detecting fractures during the review of radiographs of the musculoskel
intended_use_full: Rayvolve is a computer-assisted detection and diagnosis (CAD) software device to assist radiologists and emergency physicians in detecting fractures during the review of radiographs of the musculoskeletal system. Rayvolve is indicated for adults only (≥ 22 years old).
ground_truth: Ground truth binary labeling and fracture localization provided by a panel of three US board-certified musculoskeletal radiologists
other_metrics: Standalone performance: Sensitivity 98.763% (95% Wilson's CI: 0.97559; 0.99421), Specificity 88.558% (95% Wilson's CI: 0.87119; 0.89882), AUC 0.98607 (95% Bootstrap CI: 0.98104; 0.99058). Reader AUC improvement from 0.84602 (unaided) to 0.89327 (aided), difference 0.04725 (95% CI: 0.03376; 0.061542), p=0.0041. Reader sensitivity improvement from 86.561% to 95.54%.
